conflictBlocks.oursContent:
// Bumped per request (daily reset time default is 3AM EST).
export const APP_VERSION = "01.01.06.005.presentation_redesign.020";
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
// Bumped per request.
export const APP_VERSION = "01.01.06.005.presentation_redesign.020";
// Modal to drill down YouTube by hour

const reset = await getResetConfig();
  const todayStart = computeTodayStart({ now, reset });

preservedBehaviors.description: version.js exports APP_VERSION with the correct version string
apiUsage handler exports GET and POST handlers
apiUsage handler has normalizeResetConfig function
apiUsage handler stores reset config in app_settings with UPSERT
apiUsage handler supports three timezone options: EST, PST, UTC
apiUsage GET returns groups including youtube, spotify, tmdb
ApiUsageReportSection component uses useQuery and useMutation
ApiUsageReportSection renders daily reset controls
version.js comment mentions daily reset time default is 3AM EST
ApiUsageReportSection imports useCallback
ApiUsageReportSection defines RESET_DEFAULT with timeZoneLabel
ApiUsageReportSection defines TZ_OPTIONS array
ApiUsageReportSection has picker modal for hour and timezone
apiUsage handler returns todayTimeZoneLabel in windows response
apiUsage handler DEFAULT_RESET includes timeZoneLabel
ApiUsageReportSection note text includes todayTzLabel
apiUsage handler has computeTodayStart function
apiUsage handler computeTodayStart falls back to yesterday when before reset
apiUsage handler has hour12To24 conversion function
apiUsage handler normalizeResetConfig accepts hour12 field name
apiUsage handler normalizeResetConfig accepts tz alias for timeZone
ApiUsageReportSection uses timeline modal for YouTube hourly breakdown
